insurers.name: Allianz SE
insurers.description: Germany's and the world's largest insurance group. Founded in Berlin in 1890.

insurers.name: DKV Deutsche Krankenversicherung (ERGO)
insurers.description: Germany's largest private health insurer by number of insured persons. Part of ERGO/Munich Re.

insurers.name: ERGO Group (Munich Re)
insurers.description: Major German insurer owned by Munich Re. Combines DKV, Victoria, Hamburg-Mannheimer brands.

insurers.name: AXA Germany
insurers.description: German subsidiary of French AXA Group. Major multi-line insurer.

insurers.name: Debeka Versicherungsgruppe
insurers.description: Germany's largest PKV by member count. Mutual insurer, particularly popular with civil servants.

insurers.name: SIGNAL IDUNA Gruppe
insurers.description: Major mutual insurance group serving self-employed, craftsmen, and freelancers.

insurers.name: HUK-COBURG Versicherungsgruppe
insurers.description: Germany's largest motor insurer by vehicles insured. Known for direct-to-consumer value.

insurers.name: Gothaer Versicherungsbank
insurers.description: One of Germany's oldest insurers. Mutual with strong SME and private customer base.

insurers.name: Barmenia Versicherungen
insurers.description: Wuppertal-based mutual insurer known for comprehensive PKV and strong customer service.

insurers.name: Hallesche Krankenversicherung (ALH Group)
insurers.description: Part of ALH Group with Alte Leipziger. Strong ambulatory PKV tariffs.

insurers.name: Continentale Versicherungsverbund
insurers.description: Mutual insurance group known for long-term PKV premium stability.

insurers.name: Hannoversche Lebensversicherung
insurers.description: Direct life insurer, consistently rated best-value for Risikolebensversicherung.

insurers.name: CosmosDirekt (Generali)
insurers.description: Germany's largest direct insurer. Part of Generali Group.

insurers.name: EUROPA Versicherung
insurers.description: Part of Continentale Group. Specialist in cost-effective term life insurance.

insurers.name: ADAC Autoversicherung (Zurich)
insurers.description: Motor insurance offered through Germany's largest automobile club (21M+ members), underwritten by Zurich.

insurers.name: DEVK Versicherungen
insurers.description: Originally for Deutsche Bahn employees, now open to all. Strong in motor insurance.

insurers.name: R+V Versicherung
insurers.description: Germany's largest cooperative insurer, distributed through Volksbanken Raiffeisenbanken.

insurers.name: HanseMerkur Versicherungsgruppe
insurers.description: Hamburg-based insurer, market leader in travel insurance. Stiftung Warentest winner.

insurers.name: Envivas Krankenversicherung
insurers.description: Supplementary health insurer partnered with Techniker Krankenkasse.
